title: Bitwise CIO says big tech stablecoin tests could help drive $4 trillion supply by 2030
message_html: Bitwise CIO says big tech stablecoin tests could help drive $4 trillion supply by 2030 ...
snippet: Matt Hougan said tech firms like DoorDash and Meta exploring stablecoin payouts could help drive projections of $4 trillion in supply by 2030.
